verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We’re here because of grace A part of Your great plan We have come to seek Your face Not the wonders of Your hands And yes we need Your touch But You’ve given us so much That we just want to thank You For all You’ve done for us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We’ve come to bless Your name King of kings and Lord of lords We’ve come to give You praise You are the One that we adore O Lord cleanse our hearts with fire And fill us with desire for Your courts For Your presence in our lives

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord You’ve made a way Because of Your great love And our hearts are filled with praise For all that You have done There is none like You So faithful and so true And we just want to thank You For all You’ve brought us through

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We’ve come to bless Your name King of kings and Lord of lords We’ve come to give You praise You are the One that we adore O Lord cleanse our hearts with fire And fill us with desire for Your courts For Your presence in our lives

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Great and mighty is the Lord our God Great and mighty is He Great and mighty is the Lord our God Great and mighty is He Lift up the banner let the anthems ring Praises to our King Great and mighty is the Lord our God Great and mighty is He

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We’ve come to bless Your name King of kings and Lord of lords We’ve come to give You praise You are the One that we adore O Lord cleanse our hearts with fire And fill us with desire for Your courts For Your presence in our lives

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Trade your heavy heart for a heart of joy Celebrate what God has done Join the song of praise as we gather here Celebrate the Lord of love

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Jesus is our Lord, he is reigning here We declare his kingdom's come Darkness has to flee in his holy light Celebrate the Lord of love

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: All creation sings Hear the oceans roar Let the earth proclaim that Christ is Lord

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: God is good all the time, He puts a song of praise in this heart of mine. God is good all the time, Through the darkest night His light will shine. God is good, God is good all the time.
